summary: Iteration 54 - Trending Tab Fix Verified + Comprehensive QA Audit. Main agent's fix to Creator Tools Trending tab is CONFIRMED WORKING. The fetchTrending function now correctly calls GET /api/creator-tools/trending and displays 8 trending topics from the backend API. All 6 Creator Tools tabs verified working. Login/Signup form validations working correctly.

minor.issue: Backend charges 3 credits but UI shows 2 credits - minor UI discrepancy from previous iteration

critical_code_review_comments: TRENDING FIX VERIFIED: CreatorTools.js fetchTrending() now correctly calls /api/creator-tools/trending API
Login page validations working: email format, password length, empty field checks
Signup page validations working: name validation (no numbers-only), email format, password strength checklist
Forgot password modal open/close/ESC behavior working correctly
All 8 dashboard feature cards present and navigable

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All pages load, all forms validate, all navigation works

context_for_next_testing_agent: Trending tab fix is verified and working. All 6 Creator Tools tabs tested. Login/Signup validations comprehensive. Billing page shows all subscription plans and credit packs correctly.
